subject: docs: record second DaisyUI audit pass findings + update cheat sheet
body:
Captures the second 10-step DaisyUI v5 audit pass (commit de2e6ad)
in SESSION_NOTES, HISTORY, TODO, and the DAISYUI_V5_NOTES cheat sheet.

docs/SESSION_NOTES.md:
  New "Recent Updates (2026-04-13 — second audit pass)" block at
  the top of Current State. Documents all four audit gap fixes
  (hardcoded Tailwind colors -> semantic tokens, loading-spinner
  shadow removal, single-value progress bars -> native <progress>,
  dead metric-selector / pin-btn marker classes) with rejection
  reasons for items deliberately NOT migrated (hamburger-divider,
  HeatmapTooltip portal pattern, DebugPill isolated root).

docs/HISTORY.md:
  New "Second audit pass" section above the "Post-migration audit
  loose-end fixes" entry from earlier today. Full breakdown of all
  four gap fixes with:
    1. Color mapping table (Tailwind shade -> DaisyUI semantic
       token -> typical use case)
    2. loading-spinner shadow removal + CSS cleanup list
    3. Progress bar migration pattern with before/after JSX
    4. Dead marker class removal rationale
  Plus a "Verification" section listing every grep command run
  to confirm the build output.

docs/TODO.md:
  Footer "Last updated" paragraph rewritten to cover all 8
  follow-up fixes across both audit passes (was 4 after the first
  pass) and to explicitly call out zero hardcoded Tailwind shades
  and zero dead marker classes as the post-audit invariants.

docs/DAISYUI_V5_NOTES.md:
  New "Data-viz color tokens" section with the canonical semantic
  token mapping table for good/success/bad/neutral/primary/etc.
  categories. New "Loading spinners" and "Progress bars" entries
  under "Project conventions we use" with the required class
  patterns and the single-value vs stacked-bar decision rule.
  Header rationale block updated to mention that a SECOND audit
  pass caught three more gaps (hardcoded colors, loading-spinner
  shadow, progress bar structure) so future sessions know the
  cheat sheet already accounts for every gap caught so far.

Tags: documentation, daisyui, migration, audit
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: daisyui-component-migration
Semver: patch
title: record second DaisyUI audit pass findings + update cheat sheet
